completed_tasks.name: Rename all function parameters to p_ prefix
Add public. prefix to all public schema objects
Rewrite test data to camelCase DataObjectData format

blockers.description: auth-setup test fails: candidate login succeeds but page stays on /login URL
blockers.workaround: Cascades to all 8 candidate-app tests. Need to investigate auth flow.

blockers.description: 5 voter tests fail: voter-detail (party), voter-matching, voter-results (3)
blockers.workaround: Other voter tests (journey, static pages, detail candidate) now pass. These specific tests may have entity data rendering issues.

blockers.description: GoTrue auth.users NULL column bug causes listUsers failures on fresh db reset
blockers.workaround: safeListUsers() returns empty array on failure. Seed.sql has UPDATE fix. ALTER TABLE can't run from seed (permission denied).

decisions.rationale: Allows inserting new files between categories

decisions.decision: Test data uses camelCase with supabaseAdminClient converting to snake_case via PROPERTY_MAP/TABLE_MAP
decisions.rationale: Follows DataObjectData format, single source of truth for conversion

decisions.decision: Added external_id to COLUMN_MAP and relationship ref conversion in bulkImport
decisions.rationale: External refs in test data use {externalId: ...} which must become {external_id: ...} for SQL RPC

decisions.decision: Added results.cardContents and sections to data.setup.ts
decisions.rationale: mergeAppSettings does shallow Object.assign - DB results overwrites defaults losing cardContents

decisions.decision: CJS export added to supabase-types package.json
decisions.rationale: tsx module resolution needs require export for test scripts

uncommitted_files: apps/supabase/supabase/schema/* (24 new files, 22 old deleted + alternatives/)
next_action: Debug 14 remaining E2E failures. Two root causes: (1) auth-setup fails - candidate login stays on /login URL, investigate get_candidate_user_data or cookie auth; (2) 5 voter tests fail on results/detail/matching - entity data rendering issue.
context_notes: Massive 7-point refactoring is 95% complete. All schema, type, and test data changes are done. 29 tests pass including data import, voter journey, static pages, candidate registration/profile, variant tests. The auth-setup failure cascades to all 8 candidate-app tests. The voter failures are concentrated in results/matching/detail (party drawer) pages.
